text: 🔄 Forwarded from Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸: 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 I spoke with Irishman and SMO veteran Aiden Minnis, recipient of the Medal of Suvorov for courage, to ask him how he felt about going back to the front after spending nearly two weeks in Moscow on vacation for the first time in 15 months. Here are his thoughts. Victory is ours, comrade! 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 Follow me Christopher Helali, on YouTube , X, Instagram, and TikTok
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸：🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 我采访了爱尔兰人、特别军事行动老兵艾登·米尼斯（Aiden Minnis），他因英勇被授予苏沃洛夫勋章。我问他，在莫斯科度假近两周（这是他15个月来的第一次度假）后，回到前线有什么感受。以下是他的想法。胜利属于我们，同志！🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 在YouTube、X、Instagram和TikTok上关注我 Christopher Helali

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron: I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇸🇪 🇳🇴 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 🇭🇷 More European leaders congratulate Peter Magyar on his election victory over Viktor Orbán. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利取得胜利！法国向匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的坚持以及民主参与的胜利致敬……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇸🇪 🇳🇴 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 🇭🇷 更多欧洲领导人祝贺彼得·马扎尔在选举中战胜维克托·欧尔班。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Hungarian Prime Minister Orban conceeded the parliamentary elections. "Dear friends, the election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, the election result is painful for us, but clear, we were not given the responsibility and…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungarian Prime Minister Orban reassured Hungarians from the opposition. "But no matter how it turned out, we from the opposition will serve our country and the Hungarian nation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班承认议会选举失败。“亲爱的朋友们，选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可见。选举结果对我们来说是痛苦的，但很明确，我们没有被赋予责任和……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班向反对派中的匈牙利人保证。“但无论结果如何，我们作为反对派将继续为我们的国家和匈牙利民族服务。” @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇪🇺 European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen reacted to Viktor Orbán’s heavy election defeat: 🇭🇺 “Tonight, the heart of Europe beats stronger in Hungary.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043415753446093128/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩对维克托·欧尔班的惨败作出回应：🇭🇺 “今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043415753446093128/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Post from the President of the European Union, Ursula von der Leyen, following today’s historic election results ousting Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán and his Pro-Russian, Anti-EU “Fidesz–KDNP Party Alliance” from power for the first time since 2010: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 欧盟主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩在今日历史性选举结果出炉后的推文，该结果导致匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班及其亲俄、反欧盟的“青民盟-基民民党联盟”自2010年以来首次下台：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @magyarpeterMP : French President @EmmanuelMacron and @ManfredWeber , President of the European People's Party, have just called to congratulate us on our victory. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @magyarpeterMP：法国总统 @EmmanuelMacron 和欧洲人民党主席 @ManfredWeber 刚刚致电祝贺我们取得胜利。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @magyarpeterMP : Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has just called to congratulate us on our victory. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz RT @magyarpeterMP：维克托·欧尔班总理刚刚致电祝贺我们取得胜利。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @vonderleyen : Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. Magyarország Európát választotta. Európa mindig Magyarországot választotta. Együtt erősebbek vagyunk. Egy ország visszatér az európai útjára. Az Unió erősebbé válik. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @vonderleyen：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。一个国家重拾其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。Magyarország Európát választotta. Európa mindig Magyarországot választotta. Együtt erősebbek vagyunk. Egy ország visszatér az európai útjára. Az Unió erősebbé válik. 推文

La France salue une victoire de la participation démocratique, de l’attachement du peuple hongrois aux valeurs de l’Union européenne et pour la Hongrie en Europe. Ensemble, faisons avancer une Europe plus souveraine, pour la sécurité de notre continent, notre compétitivité et notre démocratie. tweet

text: OSINTdefender Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has officially conceded his and the Fidesz–KDNP Party Alliance’s significant loss in today’s Parliamentary Elections, being ousted from power for the first time since 2010, having lost roughly 135 of the 199 total seats to the Tisza Party led by opposition leader Péter Magyar. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班已正式承认他和青民盟-基民民党联盟在今日议会选举中惨败，自2010年以来首次下台，在总共199个席位中失去了约135个席位给反对派领导人彼得·马扎尔领导的蒂萨党（Tisza Party）。推文

text: Open Source Intel Macron: ‘I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union, and for Hungary in Europe. Together, let us advance a more sovereign Europe, for the security of our continent, our competitiveness, and our democracy.’ tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 马克龙：“我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利取得胜利！法国向匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的坚持以及民主参与的胜利致敬，并为匈牙利在欧洲感到高兴。让我们共同推动一个更加主权、安全、具有竞争力和民主的欧洲。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) 📞 🇭🇺 During a phone call, Viktor Orbán congratulated his main rival, Péter Magyar, on the victory in Hungary's parliamentary election as thus accepted his defeat. text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found.

text: 🇮🇷 Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament, on control of the Strait of Hormuz: "If they had realized we would achieve such a position and take control of the Strait of Hormuz, perhaps they would have been more cautious in going to war with us." Now not only are we not sanctioned, but any country we want can be sanctioned: America is sanctioned, the regime is sanctioned." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊（Haji Babaei）谈及霍尔木兹海峡的控制权：“如果他们意识到我们将取得这样的地位并控制霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们在与我们开战时会更加谨慎。现在我们不仅没有受到制裁，而且我们可以制裁任何我们想制裁的国家：美国被制裁了，该政权被制裁了。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: An Israeli strike in south Lebanon killed a 1.5-year-old girl and several of her relatives as they gathered for her father’s funeral. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 以色列在黎巴嫩南部的一次袭击中，一名1.5岁的小女孩和她的几名亲属在参加她父亲的葬礼时丧生。来源：路透社

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The leader of the Patriotic Union of Kurdistan, Bafel Talabani, apologized to neighboring Arab countries that have come under attack from Iraqi soil, offering condolences and expressing shame. He pledged that Iraq’s new government, of which the PUK will be a leading part, will ensure arms are only in the hands of the state, move Iraq away from war, and embrace Arab brothers. He thanked Pakistan, European countries, Turkey, the US, and Iran for their efforts, urging all sides to continue dialogue: “Perhaps these talks can not only end this conflict, but be the start of ending the majority of the issues in the Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 库尔德斯坦爱国联盟领导人巴菲尔·塔拉巴尼（Bafel Talabani）向遭到伊拉克境内袭击的邻国阿拉伯国家道歉，表示哀悼并感到羞愧。他承诺，库尔德斯坦爱国联盟将作为重要组成部分的伊拉克新政府将确保武器仅掌握在国家手中，使伊拉克远离战争，并拥抱阿拉伯兄弟。他感谢巴基斯坦、欧洲国家、土耳其、美国和伊朗所做的努力，敦促各方继续对话：“也许这些会谈不仅能结束这场冲突，还能成为解决中东大部分问题的开端。” @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 Tuffaha, Sidon district, Southern Lebanon: Israeli occupation forces committed a massacre using "double-tap" strikes. A drone first targeted a car, killing former mayor Ibrahim Kawtharani and one citizen. When residents gathered to rescue the injured, the drone struck the same location again, killing and wounding more. In another location, six martyrs fell after being targeted by a drone missile. Civil defense workers who came to carry the martyrs were then targeted themselves, some martyred, others wounded. Israel is trying to create widespread psychological pressure on the Resistance environment through committing more massacres in southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩南部西顿区图法哈（Tuffaha）：以色列占领军使用了“双重打击”战术实施了大屠杀。一架无人机首先袭击了一辆汽车，杀死了前市长易卜拉欣·卡瓦拉尼（Ibrahim Kawtharani）和一名公民。当居民聚集营救伤者时，无人机再次袭击了同一地点，造成更多人伤亡。在另一个地点，六名烈士在被无人机导弹袭击后牺牲。前来运送烈士的民防人员随后也遭到袭击，一些人牺牲，另一些人受伤。以色列正试图通过在黎巴嫩南部实施更多大屠杀，对抵抗环境施加广泛的心理压力。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: We will continue to serve our country and the Hungarian nation.
text_zh: 此刻：维克托·欧尔班：我们将继续为我们的国家和匈牙利民族服务。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Leader of Hungary's TISZA party Peter Magyar reports that Hungarian Prime Minister Orban called him to congratulated him. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungarian Prime Minister Orban conceeded the parliamentary elections. "Dear friends, the election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, the election result is painful for us, but clear, we were not given the responsibility and opportunity to govern." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利蒂萨党领导人彼得·马扎尔报告称，匈牙利总理欧尔班致电祝贺他。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班承认议会选举失败。“亲爱的朋友们，选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可见。选举结果对我们来说是痛苦的，但很明确，我们没有被赋予治理的责任和机会。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: The election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear. The responsibility and opportunity of governance were not given to us. I congratulated the winning party.
text_zh: 此刻：维克托·欧尔班：选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可见。治理的责任和机会没有赋予我们。我祝贺了获胜的政党。

text: From the vicinity of Sheikh Ragheb Harb Hospital in Toul
text_zh: 来自图尔（Toul）谢赫·拉格布·哈尔布（Sheikh Ragheb Harb）医院附近

text: 🇭🇺 Peter Magyar says Orbán congratulated him on his victory. The Tisza Party has also secured a supermajority in parliament. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔表示欧尔班祝贺他取得胜利。蒂萨党也在议会中获得了绝对多数席位。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺TISZA has won 135 seats in the Hungarian parliament, winning them a supermajority. 45% of the votes have been counted so far. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Leader of Hungary's TISZA party Peter Magyar reports that Hungarian Prime Minister Orban called him to congratulated him. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 蒂萨党在匈牙利议会中赢得了135个席位，获得了绝对多数。到目前为止，45%的选票已经统计完毕。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利蒂萨党领导人彼得·马扎尔报告称，匈牙利总理欧尔班致电祝贺他。@wfwitness

text: Commander of the Iranian Navy: Trump’s threats to impose a naval blockade on Iran are "ridiculous."
text_zh: 伊朗海军司令：特朗普对伊朗实施海上封锁的威胁是“荒谬的”。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian: If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基扬：如果美国政府放弃其极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，达成协议的途径肯定会找到。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: If the United States wants to find a way out, the only path is to decide to earn the trust of the Iranian people. You are indebted to the Iranian nation and still have much to do to make amends. If you choose war, we will fight; if you come with logic, we will respond with logic. We will not submit to any threats. If they test our will again, we will give them a greater lesson.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）：如果美国想找到出路，唯一的途径就是决定赢得伊朗人民的信任。你们亏欠伊朗民族，还有很多事情要做来弥补。如果你们选择战争，我们将战斗；如果你们讲逻辑，我们将以逻辑回应。我们不会屈服于任何威胁。如果他们再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 With 6.52% reporting, Tisza now leads list voting with 84,303 votes compared to Fidesz 77,014. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 TISZA has won 135 seats in the Hungarian parliament, winning them a supermajority. 45% of the votes have been counted so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 随着6.52%的选票统计完毕，蒂萨党目前以84,303票领先于青民盟的77,014票。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 蒂萨党在匈牙利议会中赢得了135个席位，获得了绝对多数。到目前为止，45%的选票已经统计完毕。@wfwitness

text: BREAKING: Viktor Orbán congratulates Péter Magyar on election victory in Hungary.
text_zh: 突发：维克托·欧尔班祝贺彼得·马扎尔在匈牙利选举中获胜。
